title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Setup
content: Users can enable 2FA by navigating to Settings > Security. We support TOTP apps like Google Authenticator and hardware keys. SMS 2FA is deprecated as of March 2024 due to SIM-swapping risks.

title: Refund Policy for Pro Tiers
content: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days. Users are eligible for a full refund if the request is made within 14 days of the initial transaction, provided that API usage hasn't exceeded 500 tokens.
